_meta.philosophy: Simple, few-parameter algos with genuine edge in trending/volatile crypto markets. Each uses ONE signal family. Anti-overfit: walk-forward IS/OOS validation, min 20 trades gate, OOS Sharpe > 0.5 required.
_meta.exit_strategy: standardised per-algo (ATR trailing or hold_bars + stop_loss_pct). Exit params NOT grid-searched — preserves alpha.
_meta.jedi_rule: sum of all 27 votes; >=+9 = GO LONG, <=-9 = GO SHORT

A.name: BREAK
A.why_crypto: Crypto trends violently after compression. Breakouts have high hit rate in trending regimes.

algos.name: DONCHIAN BREAKOUT
algos.description: Close breaks above N-bar rolling high (Donchian channel). Classic turtle-style.
algos.entry: close > rolling_max(high, n, offset=1)
algos.crypto_edge: Strong in trending crypto; captures momentum after compression

algos.name: BOLLINGER BREAKOUT
algos.description: Close crosses above upper Bollinger Band (basis + mult*std). Exit on midline tag.
algos.entry: close > basis + mult * std(close, period)
algos.crypto_edge: Identifies volatility expansion entries in crypto bull runs

algos.name: KELTNER BREAKOUT
algos.description: Close breaks above upper Keltner Channel (EMA + mult*ATR). More stable than BB in crypto.
algos.entry: close > ema(close, period) + mult * atr(period)
algos.crypto_edge: ATR-normalized channel adapts well to crypto vol regime shifts

algos.name: SQUEEZE POP
algos.description: Bollinger Bands compressed inside Keltner (squeeze). Entry on first bull bar after release.
algos.entry: BB inside KC on prior bar AND BB expands outside KC on current bar AND bullish close
algos.crypto_edge: Crypto consolidates in tight ranges before explosive moves

algos.name: ATR EXPANSION
algos.description: Current bar range > mult * ATR AND bullish (close > open) AND above EMA50.
algos.entry: (high - low) > mult * atr(period) AND close > open AND close > ema(close, 50)
algos.crypto_edge: Identifies institutional buying pressure on large-range bars

algos.name: VOLUME BREAKOUT
algos.description: Volume surge (> mult * MA_vol) + close > prior N-bar high. Confirms real breakout.
algos.entry: volume > vol_mult * rolling_mean(volume, vol_n) AND close > rolling_max(high, price_n, offset=1)
algos.crypto_edge: Volume confirmation filters false breakouts common in crypto

algos.name: CONSOLIDATION BREAKOUT
algos.description: N tight bars (ATR < X% of price) followed by expansion bar > expand_mult * recent ATR.
algos.entry: tight_bars: range/close < tight_pct for N bars, then (high - low) > expand_mult * atr(14)
algos.crypto_edge: Catches NVT-style compression→explosion moves in alt-coins

algos.name: NEW HIGH CLOSE
algos.description: Close at highest close in N bars (continuation, not counter-trend). Momentum continuation.
algos.entry: close == rolling_max(close, n)
algos.crypto_edge: Crypto trends persistently; new high = strength, not overbought

algos.name: RANGE BREAKOUT
algos.description: Previous N bars in tight range (high-low spread < pct_thresh). Break above range high.
algos.entry: range_width = (max_high - min_low) / close < pct_thresh for N bars; close > max_high
algos.crypto_edge: Range compression before breakout is a universal crypto accumulation pattern

B.name: TREND
B.why_crypto: Crypto has prolonged trending phases. Trend-following captures the bulk of returns.

algos.name: EMA CROSS
algos.description: Fast EMA crosses above slow EMA. Simple, robust trend entry.
algos.entry: ema(close, fast) crosses above ema(close, slow)
algos.exit: ema(close, fast) crosses below ema(close, slow)
algos.crypto_edge: EMA crosses reliably identify crypto regime shifts

algos.name: EMA STACK
algos.description: Three EMAs fully stacked bullish (fast > mid > slow). Price above all three.
algos.entry: ema_fast > ema_mid > ema_slow AND close > ema_fast (all three newly aligned)
algos.crypto_edge: Full EMA alignment captures sustained crypto bull phases

algos.name: MACD SIGNAL CROSS
algos.description: MACD line crosses above signal line. Momentum shift confirmation.
algos.entry: macd_line crosses above signal_line
algos.crypto_edge: MACD is a reliable momentum trend indicator in crypto daily timeframe

algos.name: SUPERTREND
algos.description: ATR-based dynamic support/resistance flip. Bullish when price above SuperTrend line.
algos.entry: SuperTrend flips from bearish to bullish
algos.exit: SuperTrend flips from bullish to bearish
algos.crypto_edge: ATR-adaptive trailing stop rides crypto trends and avoids chop

algos.name: ADX TREND FILTER
algos.description: ADX > threshold (trend present) AND +DI > -DI (bullish direction). Only trades trending markets.
algos.entry: adx > thresh AND plus_di > minus_di AND previous bar: plus_di <= minus_di
algos.crypto_edge: ADX filters crypto chop; DI alignment confirms directional momentum

algos.name: GOLDEN CROSS
algos.description: SMA fast crosses above SMA slow (golden cross). Major trend shift signal.
algos.entry: sma(fast) crosses above sma(slow)
algos.crypto_edge: Golden cross has historically preceded major crypto bull runs

algos.name: PARABOLIC SAR
algos.description: Parabolic SAR flips bullish. Accelerating trailing stop that rides strong trends.
algos.entry: psar flips below price (bearish to bullish)
algos.exit: psar flips above price (bullish to bearish)
algos.crypto_edge: PSAR adapts acceleration to crypto momentum intensity

algos.name: EMA PULLBACK
algos.description: Price in uptrend (above slow EMA) pulls back to fast EMA then bounces (close > open).
algos.entry: close > ema_slow AND low <= ema_fast * (1 + touch_pct/100) AND close > open
algos.crypto_edge: EMA pullbacks in bull markets offer high risk/reward entries

algos.name: SMA SLOPE TREND
algos.description: Price above SMA AND SMA slope positive over N bars. Simple regime filter.
algos.entry: close > sma AND (sma - sma[slope_n]) > 0 AND prev bar: close was below or just crossed
algos.exit: close < sma OR sma slope turns negative
algos.crypto_edge: Rising SMA with price above = cleanest definition of a crypto uptrend

C.name: MOMENTUM
C.why_crypto: Crypto is driven by momentum. These algos catch the middle of strong moves.

algos.name: RSI 50 CROSS
algos.description: RSI crosses above 50 from below. Momentum regime shift from bearish to bullish.
algos.entry: rsi crosses above 50
algos.crypto_edge: RSI 50 cross reliably marks crypto trend shifts on daily timeframe

algos.name: RSI STRONG MOM
algos.description: RSI > threshold AND above EMA (trend confirmed). Catches momentum continuation.
algos.entry: rsi crosses above threshold AND close > ema(close, ema_n)
algos.crypto_edge: RSI > 60 in uptrend = strong momentum phase, not overbought in crypto

algos.name: RATE OF CHANGE
algos.description: N-bar rate of change crosses above threshold %. Simple momentum signal.
algos.entry: roc(close, period) crosses above threshold
algos.crypto_edge: ROC momentum is predictive in crypto over 7-14 day windows

algos.name: VOLUME SURGE
algos.description: Volume > mult * MA_vol AND bullish close (close > open) AND above EMA50.
algos.entry: volume > mult * sma(volume, n) AND close > open AND close > ema(close, 50)
algos.crypto_edge: Volume spikes in crypto often mark institutional accumulation

algos.name: CONSECUTIVE BULL BARS
algos.description: N consecutive bullish bars (close > open each bar) AND above EMA50.
algos.entry: all(close > open for last N bars) AND close > ema(close, 50)
algos.exit: bearish bar (close < open) OR close < ema(close, 21)
algos.crypto_edge: Consecutive bull bars = controlled persistent buying, strong signal in crypto

algos.name: OBV BREAKOUT
algos.description: On-Balance Volume at N-bar high (OBV making new highs). Volume accumulation signal.
algos.entry: obv == rolling_max(obv, n)
algos.crypto_edge: OBV leading indicator: smart money accumulating before price breaks out

algos.name: STOCHASTIC CROSS
algos.description: Stochastic %K crosses above %D from below oversold level. Reversal/momentum signal.
algos.entry: stoch_k crosses above stoch_d AND prev stoch_k < oversold
algos.exit: stoch_k crosses below stoch_d OR stoch_k > 80
algos.crypto_edge: Stochastic oversold cross in crypto uptrend = reliable mean-reversion entry

algos.name: MFI 50 CROSS
algos.description: Money Flow Index crosses above 50. Volume-weighted RSI momentum shift.
algos.entry: mfi(period) crosses above 50
algos.crypto_edge: MFI integrates volume; 50 cross signals real money flow shift in crypto

algos.name: CMF POSITIVE
algos.description: Chaikin Money Flow crosses above threshold (sustained positive money flow).
algos.entry: cmf(period) crosses above threshold
algos.crypto_edge: CMF > 0 = consistent accumulation pressure; strong in crypto trending phases

jedi.name: JEDI MASTER
jedi.description: Equal-weight sum of all 27 algo votes. Score: -27 to +27. GO LONG if score >= +9 (33%). GO SHORT if score <= -9.
